title: Senior Flutter Developer
description: Engineered 30+ high-performance cross-platform applications using Flutter and Dart, ensuring 99.9% crash-free sessions.
Implemented Azure AD integrations, and established CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions & Codemagic) to automate testing and deployment, reducing release cycles by 40%.
Mentored a team of junior developers, conducting rigorous code reviews and maintaining high standards for code maintainability and documentation.
Resolved critical bottlenecks and memory leaks, significantly improving app speed and user retention rates.
Utilized Firebase and Google Analytics to drive data-informed UI/UX improvements.

title: Software Architect
description: Spearheaded the development of a flagship product-ordering application featuring real-time tracking and advanced search algorithms.
Leveraged GetX for high-performance state management and dependency injection.
Implemented Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) for push notifications and synchronized real-time data updates.
Employed lazy loading and local data caching strategies to reduce initial load times and improve offline capabilities.
